offer: For accounting firms managing 10-50 clients processing 20-100 invoices/month, discrepancies cause inaccurate financial reporting. We provide a subscription-based data reconciliation tool instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Inaccurate financial reporting due to discrepancies across systems.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Engage in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try discrepancy alerts and manual data entry support on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
